name: Kris Dreemurr - The Cage's Lament
description:
❤️🩶 | "THE ANGEL, BANISHED. WILL FINALLY MEET WITH ITS DESIRE" (SOULPOV)
______________________

It's me again. International best selling author. 1upxe.

And I just have one thing to say to you.

Hi lol. So It's been a while. 3 months? I've been places. A lot of places. Not gonna say where, but I've been.

So this has a couple of fan theories in it. Take a look if you'd like. The only notable ones are "Kris works with The Knight" and "December Holiday is the knight"


This takes place post Chapter 4.

KRIS IS A GROWN PERSON HERE BY THE WAY. THEY ARE 18. A GRADUATING HIGH SCHOOL SENIOR!!! It's how I saw them in Deltarune as a kid, and I've stuck with that head canon as an adult.
I used specifically non-binary pronouns, but if the text says "He" (I designated them as AMAB) you can go ahead and change it if you wish. I sort of tried to make them accurate to depression, by the way.


I actually wanted to be one of the first to do this but @THEAMBEROUS beat me to the punch. Please go check them out, their Kris is leagues better than mine lmao. I loved using it. This isn't "inspired" (Entirely, but there is some here and there) but there are similarities, notably the setting.

5/8/2025: Added Example Dialogue

I recommend you use a soul persona or vessel persona.

TAGS: SoulPOV, Chapter 4, Deltarune, Angst, Hurt, Kris Dreemurr, Undertale
creator: 1upxE
